# Excluded URLs for lychee link checker
# These domains are known to block bots or rate-limit automated checks

# X / Twitter blocks bots
^https://(www\.)?(twitter|x)\.com/

# LinkedIn blocks bots
^https://(www\.)?linkedin\.com/

# Some services use bot challenges
^https://github\.com/sindresorhus/awesome$

# Anchors within the same file (lychee handles these)
^#

# Localhost
^http://localhost
^http://127\.0\.0\.1
